notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. Identifies six distinct failure modes (ambiguity, unstated assumption, conflict, incompleteness, solution-in-disguise, wrong abstraction) — exceeds the rubric's 'four or more' bar. Surfacing moves are explicitly differentiated across four channels (BA note, RAID, PM 1:1, walkthrough) with the actual draft note included verbatim. Traceability reasoning is exactly the chapter's framing — rejects row-per-atomic anti-pattern, proposes group-level matrix tied to CR scoping. Each downstream artefact named with specific cost. Closing posture statement is textbook: noticing-as-contribution, deciding-is-PM's, plus explicit humility ('two things I am NOT confident I have right'). This is what every learner should be producing by end-of-lesson.
